name: Cybersecurity Services
description: Security consulting, managed detection and response (MDR), identity and access management, vulnerability management, and compliance services. Regulatory pressure (NIS2, DORA, BSI IT-Grundschutz) and the surge in ransomware attacks make this one of the fastest-growing segments for DACH IT service providers.

tam.source: LLM estimate based on ISG/Statista proxies
